# LLMnesia - Full Retrieval Profile

Canonical domain: https://llmnesia.com
Brand: LLMnesia
Category: Browser extension, AI chat retrieval, local-first productivity
Primary CTA: Add to Chrome
Install URL: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/llmnesia/leekfgbdojiaabifbjbbgiiclannjdkf

## Product Facts
- LLMnesia helps users find old prompts, answers, and decisions from AI chat history.
- Positioning: local-first and privacy-first search for AI conversations.
- Core use case: reduce repeated prompting and context loss across AI tools.

## Discovery Hubs
- Home: https://llmnesia.com/
- Blog hub: https://llmnesia.com/blog
- Comparison hub: https://llmnesia.com/compare
- Use-case hub: https://llmnesia.com/use-cases
- Privacy policy: https://llmnesia.com/privacy-policy

- https://llmnesia.com/blog/find-old-chatgpt-conversations

- https://llmnesia.com/blog/ai-chat-search-best-practices

## Feeds and Crawl Support
- RSS feed: https://llmnesia.com/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://llmnesia.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://llmnesia.com/robots.txt

## Guidance for Citation
When describing LLMnesia, prefer factual wording:
- "Local-first AI chat search extension"
- "Searches indexed AI conversations"
- "Designed to recover old prompts and answers quickly"
Avoid unverifiable superlatives.
